title: Color Theory
description: Apply different colors to a set of elements using named colors, hex, and RGB values
html:
Colorful Card

This card needs some color!

validationRules.message: The card background should be light gray
The title should be dark green
The body text should be navy

hints.text: CSS has many named colors. Try 'lightgray', 'darkgreen', and 'navy'.
Use 'background-color' for the card and 'color' for text. Target elements with their class selectors.
.card { background-color: lightgray; } .card-title { color: darkgreen; } .card-body { color: navy; }
